title: juniperus keteleeri
intro: Juniperus keteleeri, also known as the Mexican silverberry or Mexican juniper, is a species of evergreen tree native to northern Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Juniperus keteleeri include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Juniperus keteleeri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote urinary health and reduce inflammation.
